ea8aa3f47b76.title: Android Developer - Conversational Search
ea8aa3f47b76.description: As an Android Developer on the Conversational Search team, you will help us build Redfin’s next-generation AI-powered home search experience. This team creates intuitive, delightful, and deeply integrated conversational experiences that help users discover, evaluate, and act with greater confidence. This is one of Redfin’s most ambitious and visible product initiatives for 2026. You will join a diverse and passionate community of developers working to build engaging experiences to make it easy for users to find their next home. About the Role Design and implement complex Android features that power conversational and AI-assisted experiences within the Redfin app. Build intuitive, high-performance UI that integrates intelligent capabilities into core search and listing flows. Drive architectural decisions for conversational interfaces. Collaborate with your teammates by reviewing code, writing documentation, refining best practices, and building maintainable and testable codebases. Work closely with our product and design teams to understand user and business needs. Drive the team forward in Android best practices and design principles, bringing in cutting-edge industry trends. About You You continually obsess over improving the user experience, whether it's collaborating with product managers and designers to build beautiful products or finding and squashing performance bottlenecks. You have 3+ years of development experience with at least 3 years of practical experience building Android applications in Kotlin and Java. You communicate clearly and collaborate effectively across experience levels and disciplines, and you disagree constructively with respect for others’ perspectives. You stay current with modern Android development practices and continuously raise the bar for code quality, architecture, and maintainability. You love working with a smart, talented team because you know that makes you better. You are curious about emerging AI-powered user experiences and excited to help shape the future of conversational interfaces in real estate. What you’ll get Our team members fuel our strategy, innovation and growth, so we ensure the health and well-being of not just you, but your family, too! We go above and beyond to give you the support you need on an individual level and offer all sorts of ways to help you live your best life. We are proud to offer eligible team members perks and health benefits that will help you have peace of mind. Simply put: We’ve got your back. Check out our full list of Benefits and Perks . On-Call Expectations This role may include participation in an on-call rotation to support production systems and ensure service reliability. On-call responsibilities may include coverage during nights and weekends. If applicable, frequency and scheduling will be determined by team needs and communicated accordingly. 49fe3a642d39.title: Data & AI Engineer
49fe3a642d39.description: Build what matters as a Data & AI Engineer at RevStar. RevStar is a dynamic team of engineers, architects, and product managers committed to putting your business first in the pursuit of excellence. As an AI-first, full-service innovation shop and AWS Advanced Tier Partner, we deliver end-to-end cloud-native, data, and AI solutions that create real business impact. We are passionate about what we build and how we build it. From architecture and design to coding and delivery, we approach each project with an agile mindset, continuously analyzing goals and business needs to ensure optimal outcomes. At RevStar, we foster a collaborative, remote-first culture where teams freely share ideas, innovate together, and grow both individually and collectively. By joining us, you’ll have the opportunity to work with cutting-edge technologies across diverse industries, delivering value-driven products for clients who prioritize quality and performance. We believe in the pursuit of better, not just in cloud-native app development, but in creating meaningful experiences and outcomes that matter. We are seeking an experienced Data & AI Engineer to support the execution of our packaged QuickStarts, particularly those focused on GenAI (LLM Ops) and Data Lake architecture. This role will lead the development and deployment of scalable, production-ready AI/ML solutions built on AWS-native technologies. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, consulting environment and is comfortable navigating ambiguity while leading client-facing delivery. They are a proactive leader who asks the right questions, anticipates challenges, and drives clarity, while collaborating effectively across product, DevOps, and architecture teams. Above all, the ideal candidate embodies RevStar’s core values: Self-Mastery: We hold a high bar for how we think, communicate, and improve. Ownership : We own outcomes, not just effort. Shared Destiny: We rise or fall together. Role and Responsibilities Design, build, and deploy LLM-based APIs using Amazon Bedrock, supporting models like Claude, Titan, Nova, and Cohere Implement retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines using OpenSearch + S3 Build data pipelines for curated and raw data layers using AWS Glue, Athena, and Lake Formation Support real-time reporting and AI usage dashboards via Amazon QuickSight Design serverless workflows using AWS Lambda and manage prompt metadata with DynamoDB Implement prompt orchestration strategies, including fallback handling, versioning, and safety guardrails Collaborate with product managers, architects, and DevOps to align AI/ML delivery with customer and project goals Document solutions clearly and support onboarding for handoff to client teams Stay current with AWS innovations in GenAI, MLOps, and scalable data platforms
